---
title: "Bayesian Statistics with {cmdstanr} by yylab"
toc: true
toc-title: 'Table of contents'
toc-depth: 4
---

## Prepare

Load packages.

```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse,
               cmdstanr,
               posterior,
               patchwork)
options(mc.cores = parallel::detectCores())
```
